entity.name: Hans Axelsson
entity.description: Independent developer building open-source AI agent infrastructure — local-first multi-agent orchestration, native AI apps, memory systems, and low-level systems programming.

projects.name: Council
projects.description: Multi-agent orchestration skill for OpenClaw. Routes tasks to specialized AI personas (Workhorse, Creative, Speed), runs parallel deliberation across different Grok model variants, synthesizes verdicts, and produces auditable transcripts. Minimal scaffolding — agents self-coordinate rather than following rigid hierarchies.

channels.description: Direct bank transfer available. Please email for details.
